## Subscribe to Monetary Policy and Financial Studies Division Monetary Policy and Financial Studies Division
- Xing Guo Xing Guo is the Principal Researcher in the Canadian Economic Analysis (CEA) Department. Department(s) : Canadian Economic Analysis , Monetary Policy and Financial Studies Division Research Field(s) : Business Cycles , Corporate Finance , Firm Dynamics , International Macroeconomics , Macroeconomics
